descriptor.name: MinerU (Cloud, Precise VLM)
descriptor.description: MinerU precise-parsing API powered by the highest-accuracy VLM model. Supports PDF / image / Office / Excel / HTML; HTML switches to the MinerU-HTML sub-model automatically. Files are uploaded to MinerU servers; requires an API token.

api_token.label: API Token
api_token.help: Issued from the mineru.net user dashboard
